# dataSource

**Instance Property**

Specifies the edit panel’s dataSource.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor unowned(unsafe) var dataSource: (any IKImageEditPanelDataSource)! { get set }
```

## Getting, Setting, and Reloading Data

- **reloadData()**: Reloads the data from the data associated with an image editing panel.
